chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 933 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.4249/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 13.02.2025 Mr. Salman Yousuf, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Aamir Ali, advocate for the respondent 3. Mr. Zuhaib Ahmed, advocate holding brief for Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel the subject matter of lis no longer survive, however, show cause notice has been issued to the petitioner subsequently. Prima facie, no show cause notice is mentioned in prayer clause and facts subsequent to the institution of petition did not merit consideration in the writ jurisdiction of this court. In view hereof, petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
